classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to limit the number of concurrent sessions to the Configuration Utility to 10 or an organization-defined number.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must terminate shared/group account credentials when members leave the group.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured with only one local account to be used as the account of last resort in the event the authentication server is unavailable.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to assign appropriate user roles or access levels to authenticated users.

resolution_detail.note: Appropriate roles and partition access are organization-defined and require external authorization evidence.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to audit the execution of privileged functions such as accounts additions and changes.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must manage local audit storage capacity in accordance with organization-defined audit record storage requirements.

resolution_detail.note: Audit storage thresholds are defined by the SSP and require external retention/storage policy evidence.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to prevent the installation of patches, service packs, or application components without verification the software component has been digitally signed using a certificate that is recognized and approved by the organization.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to use at least two authentication servers to authenticate administrative users.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be running an operating system release that is currently supported by the vendor.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must obtain its public key certificates from an appropriate certificate policy through an approved service provider.

resolution_detail.note: Approved certificate policy and approved service provider status require attested issuer approval evidence.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to use multifactor authentication (MFA) for interactive logins.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must require that when a password is changed, the characters are changed in at least eight of the positions within the password.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must prohibit the use of cached authenticators after eight hours or less.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to use DOD approved OCSP responders or CRLs to validate certificates used for PKI-based authentication.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to restrict a consistent inbound IP for the entire management session.

resolution_detail.note: Promoted standalone control support exists, but this is not a coherent adapter family and should not remain in manual_or_generic.

classified_nonfamily_controls.title: The VPN Gateway must use Always On VPN connections for remote computing.

resolution_detail.note: Always On VPN semantics do not fit the current family model cleanly and should be redesigned rather than promoted under manual_or_generic.
